    · rintro ⟨r, rfl⟩; use ∑ i, b i ⊗ₜ r i; simp [LinearMap.map_sum, LinearMap.map_smul, LinearMap.lTensor_tmul]
    · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩; use (Basis.tensorLeft _ b).repr y; simp [LinearMap.map_sum, LinearMap.map_smul, LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Basis.tensorLeft_apply, Basis.tensorLeft_repr_symm]]
  exact isCompact_range hf

rw [AddMonoidHom.range_eq_image, Set.image_univ, ← LinearMap.coe_comp]
  letI : Algebra ℤ (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ) := Ring.toIntAlgebra _
  let bR := (IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V).baseChange (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ)
  rw [← LinearMap.image_univ, ← LinearEquiv.range_eq_univ bR.equivFun.symm, ← Set.image_comp]
  apply isCompact_range
  · exact IsModuleTopology.continuous_of_linearMap _
  · letI := NumberField.instCompactSpaceAdicCompletionIntegers ℚ
    infer_instance

sorry]
  apply isCompact_range_of_continuous
  exact continuous_finset_sum _ (fun i _ ↦ (continuous_subtype_val.comp (continuous_apply i)).smul continuous_const)

let b := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
  let v_i := fun i => Aux.c_v_alg V v (b i ⊗ₜ (1 : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v))
  let f := fun (a : Basis.index b → IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v) => ∑ i, a i • v_i i
  have : (↑((↑@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝² inst✝¹ v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
        (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
            (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                    v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range = Set.range f := by
    ext x; simp only [AddMonoidHom.mem_range, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe, AddMonoidHom.coe_comp,
      Function.comp_apply, LinearMap.lTensor_apply, Set.mem_range, f, v_i]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
      use (Basis.equivBaseChange (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v) b).symm y
      simp only [Basis.equivBaseChange_symm_apply, LinearMap.map_sum, LinearMap.map_smul,
        LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, LinearMap.coe_toIntLinearMap, Submodule.subtype_apply,
        ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul']
      rfl
    · rintro ⟨a, rfl⟩
      use ∑ i, b i ⊗ₜ a i
      simp [LinearMap.map_sum, LinearMap.map_smul, LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul']
  rw [this]
  exact isCompact_range (continuous_finset_sum _ (fun i _ => (continuous_apply i).smul continuous_const))

letI := NumberField.instCompactSpaceAdicCompletionIntegers ℚ
  let b := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
  let n := finiteDimensional.finrank ℚ V
  let e : (Fin n → v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ) →ₗ[ℤ] (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V ⊗[ℤ] v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ) :=
    { toFun := fun r ↦ ∑ i, b i ⊗ₜ r i, map_add' := fun _ _ ↦ by simp [TensorProduct.tmul_add, Finset.sum_add_distrib],
      map_smul' := fun _ _ ↦ by simp [TensorProduct.smul_tmul', ← Finset.smul_sum] }
  have he : Function.Surjective e := fun x ↦ TensorProduct.induction_on x ⟨0, by simp⟩
    (fun m r ↦ ⟨fun i ↦ b.repr m i • r, by simp [b.sum_repr m, TensorProduct.sum_tmul, TensorProduct.smul_tmul]⟩)
    (fun _ _ ⟨rx, hx⟩ ⟨ry, hy⟩ ↦ ⟨rx + ry, by simp [hx, hy, Finset.sum_add_distrib]⟩)
  let f := (Aux.c_v_alg V v).toLinearMap.comp (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap)
  rw [LinearMap.range_coe, ← he.range_comp f]
  convert isCompact_range (continuous_finset_sum _ fun i _ ↦ (continuous_subtype_val.comp (continuous_apply i)).smul continuous_const)
  ext r; simp [f, e, map_sum, LinearMap.lTensor_apply, TensorProduct.smul_tmul']

letI : CompactSpace (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v) :=
    NumberField.instCompactSpaceAdicCompletionIntegers ℚ
  let bV := Module.Basis.ofVectorSpace ℚ V
  let bL := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
  let f : (Module.Basis.ofVectorSpaceIndex ℚ V → IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v) →
      V ⊗[ℚ] IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v :=
    fun c ↦ ∑ i, (bV i ⊗ₜ (c i : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v))
  have hf : Continuous f :=
    continuous_finset_sum _ fun i _ ↦ (Continuous.const_tensorProduct (continuous_apply i).subtype_val)
  rw [show _ = Set.range f by
    ext x
    simp only [f, AddMonoidHom.mem_range, AddMonoidHom.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply,
      LinearMap.lTensor_apply, Aux.c_v_alg, LinearEquiv.trans_apply,
      Module.TensorProduct.comm_symm_apply, Module.Basis.baseChangeEquiv'_apply,
      Module.Basis.ofVectorSpace_apply, Module.TensorProduct.comm_apply,
      LinearMap.coe_toIntLinearMap, AddMonoidHom.coe_coe, Set.mem_range]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨d, rfl⟩
      obtain ⟨c, rfl⟩ : ∃ c, d = ∑ i, bL i ⊗ₜ c i := by
        use fun i ↦ (Basis.equivFun (bL.tensorProduct (Basis.singleton Unit ℤ))) d (i, ())
        simp [Basis.tensorProduct, ← sum_tmul, Basis.equivFun_apply]
      use c
      simp only [map_sum, LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Aux.c_v_alg, LinearEquiv.trans_apply,
        Module.TensorProduct.comm_symm_apply, Module.Basis.baseChangeEquiv'_apply, bV,
        Module.TensorProduct.comm_apply, LinearMap.coe_toIntLinearMap, AddMonoidHom.coe_coe]
    · rintro ⟨c, rfl⟩
      use ∑ i, bL i ⊗ₜ c i
      simp only [map_sum, LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Aux.c_v_alg, LinearEquiv.trans_apply,
        Module.TensorProduct.comm_symm_apply, Module.Basis.baseChangeEquiv'_apply, bV,
        Module.TensorProduct.comm_apply, LinearMap.coe_toIntLinearMap, AddMonoidHom.coe_coe]]
  exact isCompact_range hf

apply isCompact_range
  · exact (Aux.c_v V v).continuous.comp (IsModuleTopology.continuous_of_linearMap _)
  · infer_instance
